message:
Based on the latest information available, the **World EEZ version 12** is the most current dataset on marineregions.org[1][3]. This version was released on **October 25, 2023** and is available in multiple formats[1].

## Available Download Formats

The World EEZ v12 dataset can be downloaded in several formats to suit different geographic information system (GIS) needs[1][3]:

- **GeoPackage**
- **Shapefile**
- **KML** (Keyhole Markup Language)
- **Low resolution version** (for reduced file size)
- **0 to 360 Degrees** format option

The complete dataset file size is approximately **122 MB**[1][3], and it has been downloaded over 36,000 times[1], reflecting its widespread use in marine geospatial research and planning.

## Dataset Composition

The World EEZ v12 dataset was created by combining the ESRI world country database with the EEZ data, providing comprehensive coverage of global maritime boundaries[4]. This represents a significant update from previous versions and continues Marine Regions' commitment to maintaining accurate and current maritime boundary information.

For users requiring maritime boundary data, whether for research, conservation planning, or maritime administration, the World EEZ v12 dataset offers the most up-to-date representation of Exclusive Economic Zones available through marineregions.org.
